2606.22113.title: KITE: Decoupling Kinematics and Interaction for Zero-Shot Cross-Embodiment Manipulation
2606.22113.paper_summary: Generalizing manipulation policies across robot embodiments remains difficult because standard policies entangle task reasoning with embodiment-specific motor control. We study zero-shot cross-embodiment manipulation, where a policy trained on source embodiments must be deployed on a structurally different target embodiment without additional task demonstrations. We introduce Kinematic Interaction Transfer across Embodiments (KITE), which decouples manipulation into embodiment-agnostic task reasoning and embodiment-specific motor control, connected through a learned latent representation of interaction intent based on contact patterns. Task reasoning is performed by a shared policy that predicts latent intents from source demonstrations, while motor control is performed by an intent-conditioned action decoder learned from each embodiment's kinematic model. With KITE, adaptation to a new embodiment requires only training a new action decoder using its kinematic model, without recollecting demonstration data. We evaluate KITE on three manipulation tasks spanning transfer between parallel grippers, dexterous hands, and composite embodiments. KITE consistently achieves zero-shot transfer to structurally different target embodiments, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in transfer success and task-embodiment scope.
2606.22113.paper_summary_zh: 一般化機器人實體之間的操作策略仍然困難，因為標準策略將任務推理與特定實體的運動控制糾纏在一起。<lb/>我們研究零樣本跨實體操作，其中在源實體上訓練的策略必須在結構上不同的目標實體上部署，而無需額外的任務演示。<lb/>我們引入了跨實體的運動互動轉移（Kinematic Interaction Transfer across Embodiments，KITE），它將操作解耦為與實體無關的任務推理和特定實體的運動控制，通過基於接觸模式的互動意圖的學習潛在表示相連接。<lb/>任務推理由共享策略執行，該策略從源演示中預測潛在意圖，而運動控制則由從每個實體的運動模型學習的意圖條件動作解碼器執行。<lb/>使用KITE，適應新實體只需使用其運動模型訓練新的動作解碼器，而無需重新收集演示數據。<lb/>我們在三個操作任務上評估KITE，這些任務涵蓋了平行夾爪、靈巧手和複合實體之間的轉移。<lb/>KITE始終實現對結構上不同的目標實體的零樣本轉移，在轉移成功率和任務-實體範圍方面超越了最先進的基準。
2606.22113.author: Qianxu Wang et.al.
